title: MineBlockCraftGame
description: A Resource Pack for Pirate Software's "BlockGame" Server, aimed to have vanilla-like texture parity
body:
This project is discontinued, as much of it has quickly gone outdated as updates rolled in, and I no longer play on or have any intent or motivation to continue playing on BlockGame

---

**Dependencies:** [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) (Mod)

---

**MineBlockCraftGame** is a Resource Pack specifically for use on the BlockGame Server by PirateSoftware. It's not meant for general use, and likely won't function otherwise.

This pack features various custom-made models and textures with a particular focus on staying faithful to JAPPA's art style in Vanilla Minecraft. The goal is to provide a feel of "What if Minecraft was BlockGame", and let players who prefer the current Minecraft aesthetic while they play on BlockGame
